name: Chocolate Surprise Truffles
recipeIngredient: Centers:  After-dinner mints, whole candied cherries, whole almonds, pecan or walnut halves
Coating:  Powdered sugar, MOUNDS Sweetened Coconut Flakes or chopped nuts
recipeInstructions:
In a large mixing bowl, beat the butter. Stir together the powdered sugar and cocoa; add to the butter mixture alternately with the whipping cream and vanilla, blending well. Refrigerate until firm. Shape small amounts of the mixture around desired centers; roll into 1-inch balls. Drop into desired coating, turning until well covered. Refrigerate until firm. About 3 dozen truffles.
Variation: Add 1/2 teaspoon rum extract, decreasing vanilla to 1 teaspoon.
